# Wai

> Workflow manager for AI-assisted development. Organizes research, plans, and design decisions — capturing the *why* behind each choice so AI agents don't lose context.

Wai implements the PARA method (Projects, Areas, Resources, Archives) for development artifacts. It tracks workflow phases, syncs agent configuration, and generates handoff documents for multi-session AI collaboration.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](introduction.md): What wai is and why it exists
- [Quick Start](quick-start.md): Install and first steps
- [Installation](installation.md): All install options
- [Commands](commands.md): Full command reference
- [Concepts: Phases](concepts/phases.md): Project lifecycle phases
- [Concepts: PARA Method](concepts/para-method.md): How artifacts are organized
- [Concepts: Plugins](concepts/plugins.md): Plugin system
- [Advanced: Workflow Detection](advanced/workflow-detection.md): How wai detects project state
- [Advanced: JSON Output](advanced/json-output.md): Machine-readable output
- [Troubleshooting](troubleshooting.md): Common issues

## Authorship

All code in this repository was generated by a large language model. Human contribution: requirements, design decisions, planning, and review.

*[Leer en español](https://charly-vibes.github.io/charly-vibes/)*
